message:
fix(mattermost): mark all read operations as strictly idempotent

Correct 17 read operations from BestEffort to Strict idempotency
classification. Read operations ARE strictly idempotent and should be
marked as such to enable agents to safely replay read calls without
state hazards. Add read_operations_are_strictly_idempotent() invariant
test to prevent regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
